title: QA: Verify OpenAI provider implementation
intent: Verify the OpenAI provider makes correct API calls, handles errors properly, and follows the same adapter pattern as Anthropic with no bypass paths.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify correct OpenAI API URL and POST method
Tests verify Bearer token auth via secrets adapter (not hardcoded or env var)
Tests verify request body structure matches OpenAI Chat Completions spec
Tests verify response parsing extracts text from choices correctly
Tests verify non-2xx HTTP status throws explicit error
No regressions in existing provider tests
